creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 217026
patch to update the port

- update 1.34 -> 1.44
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/Text-CSV_XS
- take maintainership as Jun Kuriyama is absent for 4+ years, see:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/textproc/p5-Text-CSV_XS/Makefile?view=log

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p7 amd64
poudriere 3.3.4
perl 5.32.0
pkg 1.14.6
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
